wordplay_note: A small weight in the scales of power
card_description: Willis Gram (meaning "Gram = unit of weight") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Our Friends from Frolix 8*. Totalitarian leader whose regime oppresses ordinary humans in favor of telepaths. Name note: A small weight in the scales of power. The petty dictator — small in soul despite enormous power. First appears in *Our Friends from Frolix 8*.

reference.brief: Totalitarian leader whose regime oppresses ordinary humans in favor of telepaths
reference.significance: The petty dictator — small in soul despite enormous power
